publications.ref: Stewart PA, Fang B, Slebos RJ, Zhang G, Borne AL, Fellows K, Teer JK, Chen YA, Welsh E, Eschrich SA, Haura EB, Koomen JM. Relative protein quantification and accessible biology in lung tumor proteomes from four LC-MS/MS discovery platforms. Proteomics. 2017 Feb 14

Characteristics[Organism].evidence: lung squamous cell carcinomas and adjacent tissues

Characteristics[OrganismPart].evidence: lung squamous cell carcinomas and adjacent tissues

Characteristics[MaterialType].evidence: 4 frozen lung squamous cell carcinomas and 4 adjacent tissues

Characteristics[Label].evidence: isobaric labeling followed by peptide fractionation (TMT 6-plex)... label-free quantification (LF)

Comment[AcquisitionMethod].value: data dependent acquisition (DDA); data independent acquisition (DIA)
Comment[AcquisitionMethod].evidence: single sample liquid chromatography-tandem mass spectrometry (LC-MS/MS) with data dependent acquisition (DDA) to single sample LC-MS/MS with data independent acquisition (DIA)

Characteristics[Specimen].reasoning: 論文では'frozen lung squamous cell carcinomas'と記載されており、frozen tissueが適切な可能性が高い
Characteristics[Specimen].needs: 標本の保存状態や処理方法の詳細情報

STEP1_OVERVIEW.summary: ヒト肺扁平上皮癌組織と隣接正常組織を用いたプロテオミクス実験。4つのLC-MS/MS戦略（DDA、DIA、TMT 6-plex、label-free）を比較。冷凍組織サンプルを使用し、DDAとDIAによるデータ取得方法、TMTとlabel-freeによる定量法を検討。細胞株は使用されておらず、primary tissueベースの研究。

Characteristics[CleavageAgent].evidence: trypsin digestion was carried out overnight at 37 °C with an enzyme/substrate ratio of 1/50

Characteristics[AlkylationReagent].evidence: followed by alkylation with 11 mM iodoacetamide at room temperature for 15 minutes in the dark

Characteristics[ReductionReagent].evidence: The proteins were reduced with 4.5 mM DTT at 60 °C for 20 minutes

Characteristics[Label].evidence: For TMT, an aliquot (100 µg) of total protein digest was labeled for each reporter ion channel

Characteristics[Modification].evidence: carbamidomethylation (cysteine), oxidation (methionine), and pyroglutamic acid (glutamic acid) as allowable modifications

Characteristics[Modification].1.evidence: carbamidomethylation (cysteine), oxidation (methionine), and pyroglutamic acid (glutamic acid) as allowable modifications

Characteristics[Modification].2.evidence: carbamidomethylation (cysteine), oxidation (methionine), and pyroglutamic acid (glutamic acid) as allowable modifications

Characteristics[SpikedCompound].evidence: A standard peptide retention time calibrator mixture (PRTC, Pierce #88320) was spiked in each LC-MS/MS analysis

Comment[FractionationMethod].evidence: an aliquot (600 µg) of total protein digest was fractionated using basic pH reversed phase HPLC

Comment[NumberOfFractions].evidence: Twelve concatenated fractions were analyzed with LC-MS/MS for the LF and TMT experiments

Comment[Separation].evidence: The trapped peptides were eluted onto the analytical column, (C18, 75 µm ID×50 cm, 2 µm, 100Å, Dionex, Sunnyvale, CA)

STEP2_SAMPLE_PREP.summary: サンプル調製の詳細が明確に特定された。trypsin消化、DTT還元、iodoacetamide alkylation、TMT 6-plexおよびlabel-free標識を使用。修飾はCarbamidomethyl、Oxidation、Pyroglutamic acidを設定。basic pH reversed phase HPLCで12分画に分離し、C18逆相クロマトグラフィーで分析。PRTCペプチドを品質管理用にスパイクイン。

Comment[Instrument].evidence: A nanoflow ultra high performance liquid chromatograph (RSLC, Dionex, Sunnyvale, CA) interfaced with an electrospray quadrupole-orbital ion trap mass spectrometer (QExactive Plus, Thermo, San Jose, CA) was used for tandem mass spectrometry peptide sequencing experiments.

Comment[FragmentationMethod].evidence: normalized collision energy set to 28 (DDA), normalized collision energy value was set to 30 (TMT)

Comment[AcquisitionMethod].value: data dependent acquisition (DDA); data independent acquisition (DIA)
Comment[AcquisitionMethod].evidence: DDA LC-MS/MS Analysis... DIA Analysis of Label-Free Unfractionated Samples

Comment[IonizationType].evidence: electrospray quadrupole-orbital ion trap mass spectrometer

Comment[MS2MassAnalyzer].evidence: electrospray quadrupole-orbital ion trap mass spectrometer (QExactive Plus)

Comment[CollisionEnergy].evidence: normalized collision energy set to 28... normalized collision energy value was set to 30

Comment[PrecursorMassTolerance].evidence: precursor mass tolerance was set to 10 ppm

Comment[NumberOfMissedCleavages].evidence: Two missed tryptic cleavages were allowed

Comment[GradientTime].evidence: The 90-minute gradient was programmed as: 95% solvent A (aqueous 2% acetonitrile + 0.1% formic acid) for 8 minutes...

Comment[FlowRateChromatogram].evidence: The flow rate on analytical column was 300 nl/min

STEP3_MS_SETTINGS.summary: 質量分析装置と設定パラメータが完全に特定された。Q Exactive Plus装置を使用し、DDAおよびDIA取得方法でHCD断片化を実施。nanoESIイオン化、orbitrap MS2分析器を使用。衝突エネルギーはDDAで28、TMTで30に設定。前駆体質量許容誤差10 ppm、フラグメント質量許容誤差0.05 Da、最大見逃し切断数2、90分間グラデーション、300 nl/minの流速で分析を実施。

Characteristics[BiologicalReplicate].evidence: Six of the eight clinical samples are paired sets of tumor and adjacent lung tissues from the same patients. ファイル名のN/T+数字パターンから、N294-N299が隣接正常組織、T298-T303が腫瘍組織を表し、同じ数字が同じ患者（生物学的レプリケート）を示す

Characteristics[NumberOfBiologicalReplic.evidence: Six of the eight clinical samples are paired sets of tumor and adjacent lung tissues from the same patients, and the unpaired samples are designated as patients 4 and 5 or P4/5. 8つの臨床サンプルが使用された

Characteristics[NumberOfTechnicalReplica.evidence: ファイル名パターンでN/T+数字-1.rawとN/T+数字-2.rawが存在し、-1と-2が技術的レプリケートを示している。各生物学的サンプルに対して2つのテクニカルレプリケートが実施されている

Characteristics[NumberOfSamples].evidence: 8つの生物学的サンプル × 2つの技術的レプリケート = 16ファイル。実際のrawファイル数も16個で一致

FactorValue[Disease].evidence: paired sets of tumor and adjacent lung tissues. ファイル名のNプレフィックスが隣接正常組織（normal/adjacent）、Tプレフィックスが腫瘍組織（tumor）を示している

candidates: not applicable for DIA single samples
Comment[FractionIdentifier].reasoning: Twelve concatenated fractions were analyzed with LC-MS/MS for the LF and TMT experiments. しかし現在のrawファイル名には分画番号が含まれておらず、DIA実験のunfractionated samplesの可能性が高い
Comment[FractionIdentifier].needs: 他のPRIDE datasetに分画データが存在するかの確認

STEP4_RAW_FILES.summary: rawファイル名の体系的分析により実験デザインが明確化された。16ファイルは8人の患者から採取した腫瘍組織（T）と隣接正常組織（N）の技術的重複測定を表している。各患者につき2つの組織タイプ×2回の技術的レプリケートで計16分析が実施された。ファイル名に分画識別子がないため、これらはDIA実験のunfractionated samplesと推定される。分画を含むLF/TMT実験データは別のPRIDE datasetに存在する可能性がある。
